name: MEDDIC
description: Evaluates qualification rigor: Metrics, Economic Buyer, Decision Criteria, Decision Process, Identify Pain, Champion.

criteria.name: Metrics
criteria.description: Uncovers and validates the quantifiable measures of success

levels.label: Poor
levels.description: No attempt to identify success metrics

levels.label: Below Average
levels.description: Asks about goals but not specific KPIs

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: Identifies some metrics but doesn't validate them

levels.label: Good
levels.description: Clear metrics tied to business outcomes

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Validated metrics with baseline and target numbers

criteria.name: Economic Buyer
criteria.description: Identifies and engages the person with budget authority

levels.label: Poor
levels.description: No awareness of who controls the budget

levels.label: Below Average
levels.description: Assumes current contact is the decision maker

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: Asks who else is involved but doesn't map power

levels.label: Good
levels.description: Identifies economic buyer and plans engagement

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Maps buying committee and tailors approach to EB

criteria.name: Decision Criteria
criteria.description: Understands how the client will evaluate and choose a solution

levels.label: Poor
levels.description: No questions about evaluation criteria

levels.label: Below Average
levels.description: Assumes price is the only factor

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: Asks about criteria but doesn't influence them

levels.label: Good
levels.description: Maps criteria and positions solution against each

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Shapes criteria in favor of unique differentiators

criteria.name: Decision Process
criteria.description: Maps the buying process, timeline, and approval steps

levels.label: Poor
levels.description: No understanding of how decisions get made

levels.label: Below Average
levels.description: Asks about timeline only

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: General sense of process but gaps in understanding

levels.label: Good
levels.description: Clear process map with milestones and owners

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Co-creates a mutual action plan with the client

criteria.name: Identify Pain
criteria.description: Uncovers the compelling event or pain driving the evaluation

levels.label: Poor
levels.description: No pain identified, solution looking for a problem

levels.label: Below Average
levels.description: Surface-level pain, not compelling

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: Real pain identified but not quantified

levels.label: Good
levels.description: Pain quantified and tied to business impact

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Compelling pain with urgency — cost of inaction is clear

criteria.name: Champion
criteria.description: Identifies and develops an internal advocate for the solution

levels.label: Poor
levels.description: No champion identified or developed

levels.label: Below Average
levels.description: Friendly contact but not a true champion

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: Potential champion but hasn't been tested or coached

levels.label: Good
levels.description: Champion identified, has influence and access

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Champion is actively selling internally on your behalf
